title: ponerorchis × alpestroides
intro: Ponerorchis × alpestroides, also known as the alpine orchid or wintergreen orchid, is a hybrid orchid species that is a cross between Ponerorchis gracillima and Orchis mascula. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and act as a diuretic, making it a potential treatment for conditions such as urinary tract infections and bronchitis. The health benefits of Ponerorchis × alpestroides include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce swelling and alleviate pain, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. Herbal preparations of Ponerorchis × alpestroides typically involve drying the roots and using them in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential side effects.
